news.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

news.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

news.title: A solution to AI’s growing power demand: Homes
news.description: [THE STAR] Tesla, Sunrun and Renew Home plan to tap solar panels, batteries, thermostats and other devices installed in millions of homes to meet the energy demands of artificial intelligence.
